about.title: About
about.description1: I'm a final-year Software Engineering student passionate about building clean, user-friendly digital products. I specialize in fullstack web and mobile development using technologies like React, Next.js, NestJS, and PostgreSQL.
about.description2: From solo projects to team-based academic platforms, I've built tools that support collaboration, e-commerce, and even AI-powered features. I enjoy learning new technologies and challenging myself to create real, usable solutions.

fullstack.title: Fullstack Web & Mobile Development
fullstack.description: Building responsive websites and cross-platform mobile apps using modern frameworks like React, Next.js, and React Native.

team.title: System Design & UI/UX
team.description: Designing systems with multiple roles, ensuring security and performance, while creating beautiful, user-friendly interfaces.

ai.title: AI Integration & Learning
ai.description: Exploring how AI can enhance user experience—such as AI-generated tasks, virtual try-ons.

hero.name: Nhung
hero.description: I’m a software engineering student passionate about building impactful full-stack web and mobile applications.

workspacing.title: Workspacing
workspacing.description: A full-stack productivity platform for personal and team workspaces with AI-powered task suggestions.

authentication.title: Authentication
authentication.description: My own auth toolkit with reusable components, hooks and utils to use auth in server & client components, API routes and server actions.

clothing.title: Clothing Shop
clothing.description: An ecommerce platform with website and mobile app for selling and buying clothes.

vonders.title: Vonders
vonders.description: A web-based platform to explore Vietnam’s most iconic destinations, cultural events, and travel tours.
